top_signals.title: Policy paper: Oxford-Cambridge Growth Corridor Investment Prospectus
top_signals.summary: The Investment Prospectus sets out some of the investment opportunities that make the Corridor and the UK a dynamic and exciting place to invest.

top_signals.title: List of Hiroshima A-bomb victims given airing
top_signals.summary: The register lists the names, ages and dates of death for 349,246 individuals confirmed to have died as of Aug. 5 last year. One volume is for those whose names remain unknown.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mother and daughter found dead in Hyogo Prefecture home in apparent stabbing
top_signals.summary: The police are investigating the circumstances surrounding their deaths, suspecting that the two may have been caught up in a crime as no weapons have been found.
